import sys
import re
html = sys.stdin.read\(\)
# Find all text content in spans and p tags
texts = re.findall\(r'<\(?:p|span|h[1-6]\)[^>]*>\([^<]{10,}\)</\(?:p|span|h[1-6]\)>', html\)
for t in texts:
    t = t.strip\(\)
    if t and not t.startswith\('.framer'\) and not t.startswith\('@'\):
        print\(t\)
" | sort -u | head -60)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import re

with open\('/tmp/play.html', 'r'\) as f:
    html = f.read\(\)

# Find each project block by its data-framer-name and extract the video/image within it
projects = ['canvas-exploration','card-interaction','zany','nps-redesign','nps-badges','loosely','lumen','astrology','data-viz','wiz','boothd','uw-design-show-website','UW-poster-concepts','seedbed','lost-in-color']

for proj in projects:
    pattern = f'data-framer-name="{proj}"'
    idx = html.find\(pattern\)
    if idx == -1:
        print\(f"{proj}: NOT FOUND"\)
        continue
    chunk = html[idx:idx+3000]
    videos = re.findall\(r'framerusercontent\\.com/assets/\([A-Za-z0-9_.-]+\\.mp4\)', chunk\)
    images = re.findall\(r'framerusercontent\\.com/images/\([A-Za-z0-9_.-]+\\.\(?:png|jpg|webp|jpeg\)\)', chunk\)
    bg_colors = re.findall\(r'background\(?:-color\)?:\([^;}"]{5,60}\)', chunk\)
    tags = re.findall\(r'data-framer-name="tag"[^>]*>[^<]*<[^>]+>\([^<]+\)<', chunk\)
    
    print\(f"\\n{'='*40}"\)
    print\(f"PROJECT: {proj}"\)
    print\(f"  videos: {videos[:3]}"\)
    print\(f"  images: {images[:3]}"\)
    print\(f"  bg_colors: {[c.strip\(\) for c in bg_colors[:5]]}"\)
    print\(f"  tags: {tags[:5]}"\)
EOF)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import re

with open\('/tmp/play.html', 'r'\) as f:
    html = f.read\(\)

# Get tag text for each project - look for the play-tag spans
projects = ['canvas-exploration','card-interaction','zany','nps-redesign','nps-badges','loosely','lumen','astrology','data-viz','wiz','boothd','uw-design-show-website','UW-poster-concepts','seedbed','lost-in-color']

for proj in projects:
    idx = html.find\(f'data-framer-name="{proj}"'\)
    if idx == -1:
        continue
    # Find end of this project block \(start of next row or project\)
    chunk = html[idx:idx+5000]
    # Find all text content within this chunk
    texts = re.findall\(r'>\\s*\([A-Za-z][A-Za-z0-9 &;,./\(\)-]{2,40}\)\\s*</', chunk\)
    unique = list\(dict.fromkeys\(t.strip\(\) for t in texts if len\(t.strip\(\)\) > 2\)\)
    print\(f"{proj}: {unique[:10]}"\)
EOF)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import re

with open\('/tmp/play.html', 'r'\) as f:
    html = f.read\(\)

# Get the play-wrapper section to understand layout
idx = html.find\('data-framer-name="play-wrapper"'\)
# Get the opening div classes
chunk = html[idx:idx+200]
print\("play-wrapper opening:", chunk[:200]\)

# Find the CSS for the rows
for cls in ['framer-nu0i', 'framer-ls7ti2', 'framer-1bh0tq6-container', 'framer-1bh0tq6']:
    match = re.search\(rf'\\.{cls}\\{{\([^}}]+\)\\}}', html\)
    if match:
        print\(f"\\n.{cls}: {match.group\(1\)}"\)

# Also look for the actual card container class used in play page
idx2 = html.find\('data-framer-name="canvas-exploration"'\)
# Get the parent container
pre = html[max\(0,idx2-300\):idx2]
print\("\\n\\nPRE canvas-exploration:", pre[-200:]\)
EOF)

import re

with open\('/tmp/play.html', 'r'\) as f:
    html = f.read\(\)

# Get the card container CSS
for cls in ['framer-60jlwc', 'framer-1e8d8lg-container', 'framer-32dhqx']:
    match = re.search\(rf'\\.{cls}\\{{\([^}}]+\)\\}}', html\)
    if match:

# Also find the play page specific override for framer-32dhqx

# Look for the framer-1e8d8lg-container in TxohQ context

import sys, re
content = sys.stdin.read\(\)
# Look for page transition / appear animations
patterns = [
    r'opacity.*?duration.*?\\d',
    r'y.*?opacity.*?\\d',
    r'stagger.*?\\d',
    r'delayChildren.*?\\d',
    r'PageTransition',
    r'pageTransition',
    r'AnimatePresence',
    r'layoutTransition',
]
for p in patterns:
    matches = re.findall\(p, content[:200000]\)
    if matches:
        print\(f'=== {p} ==='\)
        for m in matches[:5]:
            print\(repr\(m[:200]\)\)
        print\(\)
")

import sys, re
content = sys.stdin.read\(\)

# Find all spring/transition configs in the play page context
# Look for staggerChildren, delayChildren patterns
for keyword in ['staggerChildren', 'delayChildren', 'stagger', 'when']:
    idx = content.find\(keyword\)
    while idx != -1:
        print\(f'--- {keyword} at {idx} ---'\)
        print\(repr\(content[max\(0,idx-100\):idx+200]\)\)
        print\(\)
        idx = content.find\(keyword, idx+1\)
        if idx > 500000:
            break

# Find all places where y is animated \(y: non-zero initial\)
# Look for patterns like {opacity:0,...,y:NUMBER} or {y:NUMBER,opacity:0}
matches = re.findall\(r'\\{[^{}]{0,300}opacity[:\\s]*[0-9.]+[^{}]{0,200}y[:\\s]*-?[1-9][0-9.]*[^{}]{0,200}\\}', content\)

    print\(\)
EOF)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
with open\('/tmp/elisha_bundle.js'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

import re

# Find all named variable assignments that look like animation states
# Pattern: varName={opacity:NUMBER, ...y:NUMBER...} 
for m in re.finditer\(r'\(\\b\\w{2,4}\)=\\{opacity:\([\\d.]+\)[^{}]{0,200}y:\([-\\d.]+\)', content\):
    name, opacity, y = m.group\(1\), m.group\(2\), m.group\(3\)
    if y != '0':
        snippet = content[m.start\(\):m.start\(\)+300]
        print\(f'VAR {name}: opacity={opacity}, y={y}'\)
        print\(repr\(snippet[:250]\)\)
        print\(\)
EOF)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
with open\('/tmp/elisha_bundle.js'\) as f:

import re

# Find animation states with small y values \(page entrance style, not floating cards\)
# Small y like 10-50, near opacity:0, near duration values < 3
for m in re.finditer\(r'\(\\b\\w{2,5}\)=\\{opacity:\([\\d.]+\),rotate:0[^{}]{0,150}y:\([-]?[1-9][0-9]?\)\\b', content\):
    name, opacity, y = m.group\(1\), m.group\(2\), m.group\(3\)
    snippet = content[m.start\(\):m.start\(\)+400]
    print\(f'VAR {name}: opacity={opacity}, y={y}'\)
    print\(repr\(snippet[:350]\)\)
    print\(\)
EOF)

Bash(curl -sL "https://www.elishajeon.com/play" | python3 << 'EOF'
import sys, re
content = sys.stdin.read\(\)

# Find animation-related data in the HTML
# Framer embeds component data as JSON
for pattern in [
    r'opacity.*?y.*?duration',
    r'"initial":\\{',
    r'"animate":\\{',
    r'"transition":\\{',
    r'framer-motion',
    r'data-framer',
]:
    matches = re.findall\(f'.{{0,50}}{pattern}.{{0,150}}', content, re.DOTALL\)
    if matches:
        print\(f"=== {pattern} ==="\)
        for m in matches[:3]:
            print\(repr\(m\)\)
        print\(\)
EOF)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import re
with open\('/tmp/elisha_play.html'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Found text animation: opacity:0.001, filter:blur\(10px\), translateY\(10px\)
# Now find the card animations
# Look for the appear-id elements and their full context
for appear_id in ['cgbzz9', 'b48fbz', '1ikq4dm']:
    idx = content.find\(f'appear-id="{appear_id}"'\)
    while idx != -1:
        print\(f"\\n=== appear-id={appear_id} ==="\)
        print\(repr\(content[max\(0,idx-200\):idx+400]\)\)
        idx = content.find\(f'appear-id="{appear_id}"', idx+1\)

# Also look at the JS bundle for the appear animation config
with open\('/tmp/elisha_bundle.js'\) as f:
    bundle = f.read\(\)

print\("\\n\\n=== Bundle: framer-appear configs ==="\)
for appear_id in ['cgbzz9', 'b48fbz', '1ikq4dm']:
    idx = bundle.find\(appear_id\)
    if idx > 0:
        print\(f"\\nappear-id {appear_id} in bundle:"\)
        print\(repr\(bundle[max\(0,idx-300\):idx+500]\)\)
EOF)

import sys, re
html = sys.stdin.read\(\)

# Find all image tags with their context \(200 chars before/after\)
imgs = [\(m.start\(\), m.group\(\)\) for m in re.finditer\(r'framerusercontent\\.com/images/[A-Za-z0-9]+\\.\(jpg|jpeg|png\)', html\)]
for pos, url in imgs:

    alts = re.findall\(r'alt=\\"\([^\\"]*?\)\\"', ctx\)
    aria = re.findall\(r'aria-label=\\"\([^\\"]*?\)\\"', ctx\)

    print\(f'  aria: {aria}'\)
    print\(\)
